questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The plan was approved despite some minor ______.
questions.explanation: objection 表示“反对意见”；objective 是“目标”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The committee will ______ the proposal before making a final decision.
questions.explanation: evaluate 表示“评估、评价”，符合委员会审议方案的语境。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The manager demanded that the report ______ before Friday.
questions.explanation: Verbs such as demand can take a subjunctive that-clause: should be finished, with should omitted.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Neither the students nor the teacher ______ aware of the change at that time.
questions.explanation: neither...nor...连接主语时，谓语遵循就近原则；teacher 为单数，故用 was。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: He gave me all the information ______ I needed.
questions.explanation: 先行词被 all 修饰，定语从句中关系代词常用 that。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The speaker's argument was persuasive because it was supported by ______ data.
questions.explanation: reliable data 表示“可靠数据”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The two candidates differ ______ their views on education.
questions.explanation: differ in something means to be different with respect to a particular aspect.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: He insisted on realizing his dream by ______ as a teacher in a poor village.
questions.explanation: 介词 by 后接动名词，表示“通过做某事”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Which response is appropriate after someone says, “I'm afraid I can't help you today”?
questions.option_b: That's all right. Thank you anyway.
questions.explanation: 对方无法帮忙时，礼貌回应可用 Thank you anyway.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The new teaching method has been widely ______ by local schools.
questions.explanation: adopt a method 表示“采用一种方法”；adapt 表示“适应、改编”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The fact ______ he passed the exam surprised his friends.
questions.explanation: fact 后接同位语从句说明具体内容，用 that。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The boy has a natural ______ for languages.
questions.explanation: aptitude for 表示“在某方面的天资、能力倾向”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The charity campaign aims to ______ funds for rural schools.
questions.explanation: raise funds is a fixed collocation meaning to collect money.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The committee decided to ______ the new policy after public criticism.
questions.explanation: revise means to change or improve something after reconsideration; reverse means to turn something around.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Which phrase best connects two similar ideas?
questions.explanation: Similarly 用于连接相似观点或情况。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: ______ smartly dressed you are today!
questions.explanation: How + 副词/形容词 + 主语 + 谓语，构成感叹句。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The audience responded ______ to the speaker's humorous examples.
questions.explanation: respond warmly 表示“热烈回应”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: It is essential that every student ______ the instructions carefully.
questions.explanation: It is essential that... 从句常用 should do，should 可省略。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Which sentence is most polite when asking for help?
questions.option_d: Could you please help me check this sentence?
questions.explanation: Could you please...? 是礼貌请求表达。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: He has ______ knowledge of Chinese history than most beginners.
questions.explanation: knowledge 为不可数名词，但比较级结构用 more knowledge。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The student made a ______ attempt to answer the difficult question.
questions.explanation: a brave attempt 表示“勇敢尝试”；其余选项语义不合。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: You ______ have told me earlier; now it is too late.
questions.explanation: should have done 表示“本应该做却没做”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The young researcher showed remarkable ______ in solving the technical problem.
questions.explanation: creativity 表示“创造力”，符合 solving technical problem 的语境。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The experiment failed twice. ______, the team continued to improve the method.
questions.explanation: 前后有让步转折关系，nevertheless 表示“尽管如此”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: ______ he comes or not, we will start the meeting at nine.
questions.explanation: whether...or not is used to introduce two possibilities.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: I have two dictionaries; you may borrow ______ of them.
questions.explanation: 两者中的任意一个用 either。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The road was closed because of ______ fog.
questions.explanation: dense fog 是常见搭配，表示“浓雾”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The evidence was ______ from several independent sources.
questions.explanation: obtain evidence 表示“获得证据”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The speaker's tone was polite but ______.
questions.explanation: polite but firm 表示“礼貌但坚定”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The young man was ______ of stealing the phone, but later he was proved innocent.
questions.explanation: accuse sb. of doing sth. 表示“指控某人做某事”。charge 也可表示指控，但常用 charge sb. with sth.。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The failure of the experiment was mainly ______ to poor design.
questions.explanation: be due to 表示“由于”；owing to 通常不用在 be 后作表语结构的核心。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The more carefully you read the question, ______ mistakes you will make.
questions.explanation: the more..., the fewer... 表示“越……越少”；mistakes 为可数名词复数。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The result was ______ with what the researchers had predicted.
questions.explanation: be consistent with 表示“与……一致”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The new evidence is ______ to the case and should not be ignored.
questions.explanation: be relevant to 表示“与……有关”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The reason for his absence was ______ he had a fever.
questions.explanation: 表语从句说明 reason 的内容时用 that，不用 because。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The number of applicants has increased ______ over the past three years.
questions.explanation: steadily 表示“稳定地、持续地”，与 over the past three years 搭配自然。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Which sentence is the most appropriate in a formal notice?
questions.option_d: Participants are requested to arrive ten minutes early.
questions.explanation: 正式通知应使用客观、礼貌、规范的表达。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: It was in this library ______ she found the old manuscript.
questions.explanation: This is an emphatic cleft sentence: It was...that...

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The committee reached a ______ after three hours of discussion.
questions.explanation: reach a consensus 表示“达成共识”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The company apologized for the ______ caused by the delay.
questions.explanation: inconvenience 表示“不便”；常用于道歉语境。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Not until the results were announced ______ the mistake.
questions.explanation: Not until 置句首时，主句需部分倒装。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The article presents a ______ view of the problem, considering both advantages and risks.
questions.explanation: balanced view 表示“平衡的观点、全面的看法”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The city is trying to ______ more visitors by improving public services.
questions.explanation: attract visitors 表示“吸引游客”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: ______ I known the answer, I would have told you.
questions.explanation: 虚拟条件句省略 if 时，可将 had 提前形成倒装。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The company has made a ______ effort to reduce energy consumption.
questions.explanation: a conscious effort 指“有意识的努力”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Hardly had she opened the door ______ she heard someone calling her name.
questions.explanation: 固定结构：hardly/scarcely...when... 表示“一……就……”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: He completed the task quickly, and his colleagues did it ______.
questions.explanation: likewise 表示“同样地、也一样”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Which phrase best introduces an example?
questions.explanation: For instance 表示“例如”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: This is ______ most useful suggestion I have received today.
questions.explanation: 形容词最高级前通常用定冠词 the。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: She speaks English as fluently as ______.
questions.explanation: 比较结构中为避免重复，用助动词 does 代替 speaks English。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: — Could I use your dictionary for a moment? — ______
questions.explanation: Certainly 表示礼貌许可。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The student had difficulty ______ the main idea of the paragraph.
questions.explanation: have difficulty doing sth. 表示“做某事有困难”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The new course is designed to appeal ______ students who need practical writing skills.
questions.explanation: 固定搭配：appeal to sb. 表示“吸引某人；对某人有吸引力”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The new policy will have a direct ______ on small businesses.
questions.explanation: have an impact on 表示“对……产生影响”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The workers demanded better pay and safer working ______.
questions.explanation: working conditions 表示“工作条件”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Don't forget to bring your notebook, ______?
questions.explanation: 否定祈使句的反意疑问部分常用 will you。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: — Would you mind opening the window? — ______
questions.explanation: 回答 Would you mind...? 同意对方请求时常用 Not at all./Of course not.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: He is the only one of the students who ______ passed the test.
questions.explanation: 先行词受 the only one 限定，定语从句谓语用单数 has。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: — Would you like some more tea? — ______ I have had enough.
questions.explanation: 拒绝别人提供的食物或饮品时，可用 No, thanks.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The number of students applying for the program ______ increasing.
questions.explanation: the number of 表示“……的数量”，作主语时谓语用单数。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The report is ______ to be published next month.
questions.explanation: be scheduled to do sth. 表示“计划、安排做某事”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The problem is difficult ______, but not impossible.
questions.explanation: 形容词 difficult 后常用主动形式的不定式表示被动意义。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The school encourages students to take an ______ part in class discussions.
questions.explanation: take an active part in 表示“积极参与”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: I remember ______ the book, but I cannot find it now.
questions.explanation: remember doing 表示“记得做过某事”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The students were ______ by the speaker's personal story.
questions.explanation: 修饰人受到鼓舞用 inspired；inspiring 通常修饰事物。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The temperature dropped ______ zero during the night.
questions.explanation: 表示温度、水平、标准低于某一点，常用 below zero。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The doctor suggested that the patient ______ more rest.
questions.explanation: suggest 表示“建议”时，宾语从句用 should do，should 可省略。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: It is unclear ______ the plan will be accepted.
questions.explanation: whether 引导主语从句，表示“是否”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: ______ useful advice he gave us!
questions.explanation: advice 为不可数名词，感叹句用 What + 形容词 + 不可数名词。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: She had her computer ______ yesterday.
questions.explanation: have sth. done 表示“让某物被……”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The accident was caused by a ______ of factors, not by a single mistake.
questions.explanation: a combination of factors 表示“多种因素的结合”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The plan sounds attractive, but its practical ______ remains uncertain.
questions.explanation: feasibility 表示“可行性”，符合 practical 的语境。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The decision was made in ______ with school regulations.
questions.explanation: in accordance with means according to rules or requirements.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: He is ______ taller of the two brothers.
questions.explanation: 两者中较……的一个，比较级前常用 the。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The success of the project depends largely on the team's ______.
questions.explanation: cooperation 表示“合作”，符合 team project 的语境。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Each of the applicants ______ required to submit a copy of the certificate.
questions.explanation: Each of... 作主语时谓语通常用单数。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Three fourths of the surface of the earth ______ covered with water.
questions.explanation: 分数作主语时，谓语由 of 后名词决定；surface 是单数，故用 is。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: — I failed the test again. — ______
questions.explanation: 对方受挫时，应给予鼓励。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: It was not until midnight ______ the meeting finally ended.
questions.explanation: 强调句结构：It was not until...that...。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The instructions were so ______ that many students misunderstood them.
questions.explanation: ambiguous means unclear or having more than one possible meaning.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: She ______ have left already; her coat is still here.
questions.explanation: 根据 her coat is still here 判断“不可能已经离开”，用 can't have done。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The report places special emphasis ______ environmental protection.
questions.explanation: emphasis on is the standard collocation.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Treatment of the disease requires regular medical ______.
questions.explanation: medical intervention 指“医疗干预”；interference 多指“不当干涉”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: No sooner had we arrived at the station ______ the train began to move.
questions.explanation: 固定结构：no sooner...than...，且 no sooner 置句首时主句倒装。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The final decision will depend ______ the results of the survey.
questions.explanation: depend on 是固定搭配，表示“取决于”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: There are many books on the shelf, but ______ of them is useful for this topic.
questions.explanation: 三者或以上“没有一个”用 none；neither 用于两者。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The teacher asked the students to ______ their answers with examples.
questions.explanation: support an answer with examples 表示“用例子支持答案”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: — I'm sorry I broke your pen. — ______
questions.explanation: 回应道歉时可用 It doesn't matter./Never mind.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The speaker tried to ______ the importance of careful preparation.
questions.explanation: emphasize 表示“强调”；sympathize 表示“同情”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The researcher tried to ______ the cause of the unexpected result.
questions.explanation: identify is the verb meaning to recognize or determine something.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: ______ the weather was bad, they continued the survey.
questions.explanation: 前后存在让步关系，应用 Although。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The manager was accused ______ ignoring several safety warnings before the accident.
questions.explanation: 固定搭配：accuse sb. of doing sth. 表示“指控某人做某事”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The two reports are not identical, but they are ______ in many important points.
questions.explanation: similar 表示“相似的”，符合 not identical but... 的转折语境。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Which phrase best shows a condition?
questions.explanation: as long as 表示“只要”，引导条件。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The teacher asked us ______ we had finished the assignment.
questions.explanation: ask 后接宾语从句表示“是否”时用 whether/if。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The child showed great ______ about how the machine worked.
questions.explanation: curiosity about sth. 表示“对……的好奇心”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The speaker used several examples to ______ his main point.
questions.explanation: illustrate a point 表示“说明一个观点”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The survey aims to collect data from a ______ sample of students.
questions.explanation: representative sample 表示“有代表性的样本”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The success of the plan depends on careful ______.
questions.explanation: implementation means carrying a plan or policy into effect.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Pollution may be described as an ______ enemy because it is not always easy to see.
questions.explanation: invisible 表示“看不见的”；invincible 表示“不可战胜的”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The instructions should be written in plain language to avoid ______.
questions.explanation: avoid confusion 表示“避免混淆”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The two sides failed to reach an ______ on the price.
questions.explanation: reach an agreement 表示“达成协议”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The company is looking for ways to ______ its market share.
questions.explanation: expand market share 表示“扩大市场份额”；expend 表示“花费”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The committee objected ______ the proposal because it lacked clear evidence.
questions.explanation: object to sth./doing sth. 表示“反对”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The final result was beyond our ______.
questions.explanation: beyond one's expectations 表示“超出某人的预期”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: This paragraph needs a more formal ending. Which expression is the most appropriate?
questions.option_d: I look forward to your reply.
questions.explanation: 正式邮件结尾常用 I look forward to your reply.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: A number of students ______ volunteered to help with the survey.
questions.explanation: a number of 表示“许多”，后接复数名词，谓语用复数。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: — May I speak to Mr. Brown? — ______
questions.explanation: 电话中本人接听时常用 Speaking.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: So difficult ______ that few students could answer it correctly.
questions.explanation: So + 形容词置句首时，主句用倒装结构。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The results are ______ with previous findings in this field.
questions.explanation: be in line with 表示“与……一致”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The speaker avoided making a ______ statement until more evidence was available.
questions.explanation: definite means clear and certain, which fits a statement supported by evidence.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: We need to ______ the problem from different angles.
questions.explanation: approach a problem 表示“处理、看待一个问题”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The plan is ______ only if enough volunteers are available.
questions.explanation: practical 表示“实际可行的”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The mountain village lies at an ______ of nearly 2,000 meters.
questions.explanation: altitude 指“海拔高度”；attitude 是“态度”，longitude/latitude 是经纬度。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The issue is too complicated to be solved by a ______ answer.
questions.explanation: simple answer 表示“简单答案”；句意强调问题复杂。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The professor asked us to ______ between facts and opinions in the article.
questions.explanation: distinguish between A and B 表示“区分A和B”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: I would rather you ______ the truth now.
questions.explanation: would rather 后接从句表示现在或将来愿望时，从句用过去式。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The school provides students with ______ access to online learning resources.
questions.explanation: convenient access 表示“便利的使用渠道”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The students ______ in the library are preparing for the final exam.
questions.explanation: students 与 study 为主动关系，用现在分词作后置定语。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The article gives a brief ______ of the changes in modern education.
questions.explanation: overview 表示“概述”；overlook 是“忽视/俯瞰”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The school decided to ______ the meeting until next Friday.
questions.explanation: postpone 表示“推迟”；promote 是“促进、晋升”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The new system is designed to ______ errors in data entry.
questions.explanation: minimize errors 表示“尽量减少错误”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: — I wonder if you could send me the file today. — ______
questions.explanation: 对礼貌请求作肯定回应，可表示马上去做。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The result was not ______; everyone had expected the team to win.
questions.explanation: 修饰事物用 surprising，表示“令人惊讶的”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Let's discuss the question after class, ______?
questions.explanation: Let's... 的反意疑问句通常用 shall we。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The data were incomplete. ______, the conclusion should be treated with caution.
questions.explanation: 前后为因果关系，应用 therefore。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The old city is famous for its ______ streets and quiet courtyards.
questions.explanation: narrow 用来形容街道狭窄；thin 通常形容厚度或人瘦。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The museum has taken steps to ______ rare manuscripts from damage.
questions.explanation: preserve 表示“保护、保存”；reserve 是“预留”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Which expression is suitable when giving advice?
questions.option_a: You are wrong to do that.
questions.option_b: I order you to review it.
questions.option_d: You might want to review the key points first.
questions.explanation: You might want to... 语气委婉，适合提出建议。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The results were ______ because the sample size was too small.
questions.explanation: unreliable means not trustworthy; a small sample size can make results unreliable.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: This problem is ______ more difficult than the previous one.
questions.explanation: 修饰比较级可用 far/much/even 等，不能用 very。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The course is intended to improve students' ______ of academic English.
questions.explanation: command of a language 表示“对某种语言的掌握”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The report was criticized for its lack of ______ evidence.
questions.explanation: convincing evidence 表示“有说服力的证据”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The new policy is expected to ______ economic growth.
questions.explanation: stimulate growth 表示“刺激、促进增长”；simulate 是“模拟”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Which response is most suitable when declining an invitation politely?
questions.option_c: I'm sorry, but I won't be able to attend.
questions.explanation: 礼貌拒绝邀请应先表达歉意，再说明无法参加。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Which phrase best shows a conclusion in a short essay?
questions.explanation: In conclusion 用于引出总结性结论。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: I ______ in this city for five years by the end of next month.
questions.explanation: by the end of next month 指将来某时之前完成，用将来完成时。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Which expression best completes a formal apology?
questions.option_a: We apologize for any inconvenience caused.
questions.explanation: 正式道歉常用 We apologize for any inconvenience caused.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The organization offers a ______ to students from low-income families.
questions.explanation: scholarship 表示“奖学金”；其余选项不符合语境。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Which expression best shows agreement in a discussion?
questions.option_d: I have no idea at all.
questions.explanation: I couldn't agree more 表示“我完全同意”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The project, ______ by the local government, will start next month.
questions.explanation: project 与 support 是被动关系，用过去分词作定语。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: ______ is known to all, practice is important in language learning.
questions.explanation: As is known to all 是非限制性定语从句固定表达。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: His explanation was clear and ______, so everyone understood the procedure quickly.
questions.explanation: concise 表示“简明的”，与 clear 并列符合语境。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: I will never forget the day ______ we first met.
questions.explanation: 从句中缺时间状语，先行词为 the day，故用 when。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The report provides ______ information about the local economy.
questions.explanation: valuable information 表示“有价值的信息”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Some students prefer online courses; ______, others learn better in a classroom.
questions.explanation: 前后比较对照，应用 by contrast。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: ______ he said at the meeting surprised everyone.
questions.explanation: What 引导主语从句，并在从句中作宾语。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Please remember ______ the lights before leaving the classroom.
questions.explanation: remember to do 表示“记得去做尚未做的事”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: There is little water left, ______?
questions.explanation: 陈述部分含 little 表否定意义，反意疑问部分用肯定形式。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The proposal is still under ______ and no decision has been made.
questions.explanation: under consideration 表示“正在考虑中”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The book ______ cover is blue belongs to my roommate.
questions.explanation: whose 引导定语从句，表示所属关系。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The question ______ at yesterday's meeting remains unsolved.
questions.explanation: question 与 discuss 之间为被动关系，用过去分词作后置定语。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The first experiment failed; ______, the team redesigned the procedure.
questions.explanation: subsequently 表示“随后、后来”，符合时间顺序。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: If I ______ more time, I would finish the report today.
questions.explanation: 与现在事实相反的虚拟条件句，从句用一般过去时。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: ______ more evidence, the researchers repeated the experiment.
questions.explanation: 句意为“为了获得更多证据”，应用不定式作目的状语。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The reason ______ he was late was that the bus broke down.
questions.explanation: 先行词 reason 后接定语从句，表示原因时常用 why。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The witness gave a detailed ______ of what had happened at the station.
questions.explanation: account 可表示“叙述、描述”；give an account of sth. 是常见搭配。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The two terms are often used ______, though they are not exactly the same.
questions.explanation: interchangeably 表示“可互换地”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The classroom needs ______ before the exam begins.
questions.explanation: need doing can mean need to be done when the subject receives the action.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The speaker referred ______ several recent studies in his report.
questions.explanation: refer to 表示“提到、参考”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: By the time we arrived, the lecture ______.
questions.explanation: by the time + 过去时间，主句表示此前已完成的动作，用过去完成时。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: He made a clear ______ between short-term goals and long-term goals.
questions.explanation: make a distinction between A and B 表示“区分A和B”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The professor speaks slowly and clearly; ______, his lectures are easy to follow.
questions.explanation: 前后为结果关系，as a result 表示“因此”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: She is looking forward to ______ from the university.
questions.explanation: look forward to 中 to 为介词，后接动名词。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The first method is expensive. ______, it takes too much time.
questions.explanation: 前后为递进关系，应用 moreover。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The program aims to raise students' ______ of environmental protection.
questions.explanation: raise awareness of sth. 表示“提高对……的意识”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The book, together with the notes, ______ on the desk.
questions.explanation: 主语中心词是 The book，together with 不影响谓语单复数，故用 is。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: You should not sit down ______ and do nothing when difficulties appear.
questions.explanation: in despair 表示“绝望地”，符合语境。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The meeting was put off ______ the chairman was ill.
questions.explanation: 空后是完整从句，应用 because；because of/due to/owing to 后接名词短语。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The old factory has been ______ into a modern art center.
questions.explanation: convert A into B 表示“把A转变为B”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The mayor promised to ______ public transport in the next five years.
questions.explanation: improve public transport 表示“改善公共交通”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The museum is open every day ______ Monday.
questions.explanation: except Monday 表示“除周一外”；besides 表示“除……之外还”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The policy is intended to ______ equal opportunities for all students.
questions.explanation: promote means to encourage or support the development of something.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The applicant was asked to provide ______ documents before the deadline.
questions.explanation: additional documents 表示“补充文件、额外文件”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: I have no idea ______ he will come back.
questions.explanation: idea 后接同位语从句，句意为“不知道他何时回来”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The students were made ______ the sentence again.
questions.explanation: make sb. do sth. 变被动语态时，不定式符号 to 要还原。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The instructions are ______ enough for beginners to follow.
questions.explanation: straightforward 表示“简单明了的”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The government has introduced measures to ______ air pollution.
questions.explanation: reduce pollution 表示“减少污染”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Which sentence sounds most natural in academic writing?
questions.option_a: The results suggest that further research is needed.
questions.option_b: The results say we need more stuff.
questions.option_c: The results tell everyone to do things.
questions.option_d: The results are like very useful.
questions.explanation: 学术表达应客观、准确，suggest that further research is needed 更自然正式。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The more practice you get, the more confident you ______ become.
questions.explanation: the more..., the more... 结构中可用一般现在/将来表达规律或结果。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Only after the exam ______ how important daily review was.
questions.explanation: Only + 状语置于句首时，主句需部分倒装。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: It is high time that we ______ action to solve the problem.
questions.explanation: It is high time that... 从句常用过去式表示“早该做某事”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The student was absent from class ______ illness.
questions.explanation: because of 后接名词短语；because/since/as 后接从句。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The committee asked for a more ______ explanation of the budget.
questions.explanation: detailed explanation 表示“详细解释”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The villagers were ______ to leave their homes after the flood warning.
questions.explanation: be reluctant to do sth. 表示“不情愿做某事”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The committee has made ______ decision yet.
questions.explanation: make no decision 表示“没有作出决定”；not 不能直接修饰名词 decision。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The plan sounds attractive. ______, it may be difficult to carry out.
questions.explanation: 前后转折，应用 however。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The bridge ______ before the rainy season begins.
questions.explanation: bridge 与 complete 是被动关系，且指将来动作，用 will be done。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The man denied ______ the document without permission.
questions.explanation: deny 后接动名词作宾语。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The door is locked. He ______ be at home.
questions.explanation: 根据门锁着推测“不可能在家”，用 can't 表示否定推测。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Some documents were found to be ______ because they repeated information already provided.
questions.explanation: redundant 表示“多余的、冗余的”；abundant 是“丰富的”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The project was completed ahead ______ schedule.
questions.explanation: ahead of schedule 表示“提前”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: This is the school ______ I studied five years ago.
questions.explanation: 从句中缺地点状语，先行词为 school，故用 where。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: He is one of the students who ______ passed the test.
questions.explanation: 定语从句先行词为 students，谓语用复数 have。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The data were collected carefully ______ errors could be reduced.
questions.explanation: so that 引导目的状语从句，表示“以便”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The scientist's argument was based on careful ______ rather than guesswork.
questions.explanation: observation 表示“观察”，与 rather than guesswork 构成对比。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: — Shall we go over the grammar exercises now? — ______
questions.explanation: 对建议表示赞同可用 Good idea.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The professor's remarks were brief but highly ______.
questions.explanation: informative 表示“信息量大的、有启发的”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The new rule applies ______ all students, including exchange students.
questions.explanation: apply to sb./sth. 表示“适用于”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The student is capable ______ solving the problem independently.
questions.explanation: be capable of doing something is a fixed structure.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The remote island is largely ______, with only a few researchers visiting it each year.
questions.explanation: uninhabited 表示“无人居住的”；habitable 表示“适合居住的”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The judge asked the witness to give a ______ account of the event.
questions.explanation: truthful account 表示“真实陈述”；trustful 指“轻信的”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The research team tried to ______ whether the new policy was effective.
questions.explanation: ascertain 表示“查明、确定”；assume 是“假设”，assert 是“断言”，assign 是“分配”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: It is the recommendation ______ students review their notes every week.
questions.explanation: recommendation 后接同位语从句，说明建议内容，用 that 引导。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The professor encouraged students to ______ their own views in the discussion.
questions.explanation: express one's views 表示“表达观点”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: If he had checked the data carefully, he ______ the mistake.
questions.explanation: 与过去事实相反的虚拟条件句，主句用 would have done。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: Students are expected to observe the rules even when no teacher is present.
questions.explanation: observe 在此表示“遵守”，与 rules/laws 搭配时相当于 obey。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The old building was ______ after years of careful repair.
questions.explanation: restore means to repair something and return it to its former condition.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: I cannot attend the meeting. ______, I will send my notes to the group.
questions.explanation: instead 表示“作为替代”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: You can borrow the book ______ you return it by Friday.
questions.explanation: provided that 表示“只要、如果”，引导条件状语从句。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The boy pretended ______ asleep when his mother entered the room.
questions.explanation: pretend to do sth. 表示“假装做某事”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The new evidence seems to ______ his earlier statement.
questions.explanation: contradict 表示“与……矛盾”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The medicine may have side effects, so it should be used with ______.
questions.explanation: with caution 表示“谨慎地”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The course aims to help students develop ______ thinking.
questions.explanation: critical thinking 表示“批判性思维”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The researcher is familiar ______ both qualitative and quantitative methods.
questions.explanation: be familiar with sth. 表示“熟悉某事”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: — I have passed the entrance examination. — ______
questions.explanation: 听到好消息时应表示祝贺。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The sentence is difficult because it contains more than one ______.
questions.explanation: clause 表示“从句、分句”；复合句含有多个分句。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The public library is ______ to everyone in the community.
questions.explanation: be accessible to 表示“可进入、可使用”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The two cities are connected by a ______ railway line.
questions.explanation: direct railway line 表示“直达铁路线路”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The report ______ now, so we cannot read it yet.
questions.explanation: now 表示正在进行，report 与 revise 是被动关系，故用现在进行时被动语态。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The teacher made the students ______ the sentence again.
questions.explanation: make sb. do sth. 主动语态中不定式省略 to。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The meeting was held to discuss issues of common ______.
questions.explanation: issues of common concern 表示“共同关心的问题”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The evidence is not strong enough to ______ the conclusion.
questions.explanation: justify 表示“证明……有理、为……提供正当理由”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The teacher's advice was of great ______ to the new students.
questions.explanation: be of great benefit to sb. 表示“对某人大有益处”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The new evidence cast doubt ______ the original conclusion.
questions.explanation: cast doubt on means to make something seem uncertain.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The student was praised for his ______ improvement in writing.
questions.explanation: steady improvement 表示“稳定进步”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: — Thank you for helping me with the report. — ______
questions.explanation: 回应感谢可用 My pleasure./You're welcome.

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The applicant's experience is highly ______ to the position.
questions.explanation: be relevant to 表示“与……相关”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The plan was rejected because it was not ______ with the current regulations.
questions.explanation: be consistent with 表示“与……一致”。

questions.subject: 英语运用
questions.stem: The teacher reminded us to pay attention ______ spelling and punctuation.
questions.explanation: pay attention to 是固定搭配。
